arts.ttl: Liverpool target teases January transfer after leaving PSG 'furious'
arts.sum: Cherki was already expected to get sold in the summer as he only had a year left to run on his contract but no transfer ultimately materialised, which prompted Lyon to extend the homegrown's deal by a year. The French youth international is one of the players expected to be sacrificed as Lyon seek to raise funds to stave off their provisional relegation to Ligue 2.

arts.ttl: Player provides insight into life under Arne Slot – Liverpool manager worked wonders for him
arts.sum: It’s fair to say that Arne Slot has made a positive impression at Liverpool so far, slotting in seamlessly at the club and enjoying plenty of success to date. It’s been a seamless transition from the Jurgen Klopp era, with the Dutchman’s ideas and implantation of them seemingly smooth and well received so far. arts.sum: Several Bundesliga sides have been knocked back with offers to sign Real Madrid striker Endrick on loan for the remainder of the season. Real Madrid have withdrawn from the race to sign AC Milan left-back Theo Hernandez, handing Man Utd a huge boost in their pursuit of the Frenchman.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold breaks silence on his future at Liverpool
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s future at Liverpool has been the subject of conversation at the club. The right-back has entered the final year of his contract at the club and he has still not signed a new deal at Anfield.
